title: AFO Audit Request
description: Schema for an incoming audit request from the free-audit form, as validated and stored by the Cloudflare Worker intake endpoint.

request_id.description: Unique ID generated by the intake Worker. Format: afo-{timestamp36}-{rand5}

received_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the Worker received the request.

site_url.description: The website URL to audit. Must begin with http or https.

business_name.description: Name of the business requesting the audit.

contact_email.description: Optional contact email for audit delivery.

business_category.description: Optional business category (e.g. Real Estate, Business Credit, Marketing Agency).

ip_country.description: Country of origin from Cloudflare request metadata. Not personally identifying.

status.description: Lifecycle status of the audit request.
